## Next Session: Start Here (Priority Order)
1. Initialize Next.js 15: `npx create-next-app@latest ./ --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --src-dir --import-alias "@/*"`
2. Install dependencies: Supabase, Groq, shadcn/ui, Zod, react-hook-form
3. Set up shadcn/ui: `npx shadcn@latest init`
4. Add shadcn components: button, input, label, textarea, badge, card, sonner, dialog
5. Create env schema (lib/env.ts with Zod)
6. Create Supabase client files (lib/supabase/client.ts, server.ts)
7. Build Phase 1: GenerateForm UI + /api/generate route

## Non-Obvious Context
- design.md uses Geist for UI and JetBrains Mono for domain name display — both must be loaded in layout.tsx
- .claudeignore limits discovery but NOT access — use settings.json deny-list for hard blocks
- RDAP returns 404 for AVAILABLE domains (counterintuitive) — see CONTEXT.md
- Groq rate limits: 10 req/min per user — implement in middleware before Phase 2
- Supabase RLS must be enabled on all tables before any auth work
